name: Quaquaval
flavor: Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.

ability.name: Torrent
ability.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 50 or less, attacks used by this Pokémon do +60 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
